description: Calculate a Greenhouse Gas (GHG) emissions inventory in WPS Spreadsheet using /home/ga/Documents/ghg_inventory_2024.xlsx. In the 'Energy_Data' sheet, calculate the CO2, CH4, N2O, CO2e (in kg), and MT_CO2e for all records using the utility consumption data and the EPA emission factors and Global Warming Potentials (GWP) provided in the 'Emission_Factors' sheet. Create a 'Summary' sheet featuring tables for total MT_CO2e aggregated by Scope (Scope 1, Scope 2) and by Facility (Science Building, Library, Dorms, Admin, Fleet). Include a pie or doughnut chart visualizing the emissions breakdown between Scope 1 and Scope 2. Save the updated spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/ghg_inventory_2024.xlsx.
